Container.Name: splitit
Container.Overview:
Splitit is an open-source, self-hosted Splitwise alternative with AI-powered receipt scanning.
All-in-one container: PostgreSQL is bundled inside — no external database required.
Features: - Group expense tracking with multiple split modes - AI receipt scanning: photograph a receipt, extract items, assign to friends - Pluggable AI providers: OpenAI, Claude, or local Ollama - Cross-group dashboard with debt simplification - PWA installable on mobile
Container.Description: Self-hosted Splitwise alternative with AI receipt scanning. All-in-one container with bundled PostgreSQL — no external database needed. Split expenses with friends using multiple modes (equal, percentage, shares, exact, item-level from receipts). Supports OpenAI, Claude, and local Ollama for receipt extraction.

Config.Name: Auth Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: NextAuth URL
Config.Description: The URL where Splitit is accessible (e.g., http://your-server-ip:3000)

Config.Name: Database Data
Config.Description: Path to store PostgreSQL data (for persistence across container restarts)

Config.Name: Database Password
Config.Description: Password for the bundled PostgreSQL database

Config.Name: AI Provider
Config.Description: AI provider for receipt scanning: openai, claude, or ollama

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI (required if AI_PROVIDER=openai)

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: API key for Claude (required if AI_PROVIDER=claude, unless using OAuth token)

Config.Name: Anthropic OAuth Token
Config.Description: OAuth token from `claude setup-token` (alternative to API key for Claude Pro/Max subscribers)

Config.Name: Ollama Model
Config.Description: Ollama vision model for receipt scanning

Config.Name: Receipt Uploads
Config.Description: Path to store uploaded receipt images

Config.Name: Max Upload Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum file upload size in megabytes
